title: S.O. 6(E), dated 01/01/2013 - In notification S.O. 2967(E), dtd. 20.12.2012, for the words "Shri Justice Sawatantar Kumar, Former Judge of the Supreme Court" read "Shri Justice Sawatantar Kumar, sitting Judge of the Supreme Court"
description: S.O. 6(E), dated 01/01/2013 - In notification S.O. 2967(E), dtd. 20.12.2012, for the words "Shri Justice Sawatantar Kumar, Former Judge of the Supreme Court" read "Shri Justice Sawatantar Kumar, sitting Judge of the Supreme Court"
